dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7589 IH: Resilient Food Supply Chain and Affordability Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Davids of Kansas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Agriculture to continue to carry out the Resilient Food Systems Infrastructure program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Resilient Food Supply Chain and Affordability Act.

The Secretary of Agriculture shall continue to carry out the Resilient Food Systems Infrastructure program established pursuant to section 1001(b)(4) of the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 (Public Law 117–2), in the same manner as such program is carried out as of the date of the enactment of this Act, except that beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act, recipients of assistance under such program may use funding received through such program for activities relating to meat and poultry products.
